steps: Compare the numbers: 12, 31, 47, 85. Smallest is 12, then 31, then 47, then 85. So correct order is 12, 31, 47, 85. Check options: A) 12, 31, 47, 85 matches. B) 12, 47, 31, 85 is wrong because 47 > 31. C) 85, 47, 31, 12 is descending. D) 31, 12, 47, 85 is wrong because 31 > 12. E) 12, 31, 85, 47 is wrong because 85 > 47.
